mainAbilities.en: Void magic, Shadow damage. Danger to himself and others. Interrupt Void casts.
mainAbilities.nl: Void-magie, Schaduwschade. Gevaarlijk voor zichzelf en anderen. Onderbreek Void-casts.
mainAbilities.da: Void-magi, Shadow-skade. Farlig for sig selv og andre. Afbryd Void-casts.

mainAbilities.en: Former prodigy turned Void wielder. Shadow DoT and channeled spells. Interrupt and dispel.
mainAbilities.nl: Ex-prodigy Void-gebruiker. Shadow DoT en channeled spells. Onderbreek en dispel.
mainAbilities.da: Tidligere prodigy Void-bruger. Shadow DoT og channeled spells. Afbryd og dispel.

mainAbilities.en: Void schemer. Arcane and Shadow combos. Dodge ground effects, interrupt key casts.
mainAbilities.nl: Void-strategist. Arcane en Shadow-combo's. Ontwijk grond-effecten, onderbreek key casts.
mainAbilities.da: Void-strateg. Arcane og Shadow-komboer. Undgå gulveffekter, afbryd vigtige casts.

mainAbilities.en: Void consul. Summons and Void zones. Kill adds quickly, avoid frontal cone.
mainAbilities.nl: Void-consul. Summons en Void-zones. Dood adds snel, vermijd frontale kegel.
mainAbilities.da: Void-konsul. Summons og Void-zoner. Dræb adds hurtigt, undgå frontal kegle.

mainAbilities.en: Void executor. Heavy Shadow burst, Void pools. Move out of bad, use defensives on execute.
mainAbilities.nl: Void-executor. Zware Shadow burst, Void-pools. Stap uit de bad, defensives op execute.
mainAbilities.da: Void-executor. Tung Shadow burst, Void-pytter. Gå ud af bad, defensives på execute.

mainAbilities.en: Void imperator. AOE Void damage, stuns. Spread for mechanics, interrupt Void Bolt.
mainAbilities.nl: Void-imperator. AOE Void-schade, stuns. Spreid voor mechanics, onderbreek Void Bolt.
mainAbilities.da: Void-imperator. AOE Void-skade, stuns. Spred for mekanikker, afbryd Void Bolt.

mainAbilities.en: Amani shaman. Lightning, Hex, totems. Interrupt Hex, destroy totems, avoid ground AoE.
mainAbilities.nl: Amani-sjamaan. Bliksem, Hex, totems. Onderbreek Hex, vernietig totems, ontwijk grond-AoE.
mainAbilities.da: Amani-shaman. Lynge, Hex, totems. Afbryd Hex, ødelæg totems, undgå gulv-AoE.

mainAbilities.en: Amani shaman. Storm and wind abilities. Dodge swirls, interrupt Storm Bolt, dispel curses.
mainAbilities.nl: Amani-sjamaan. Storm en wind-abilities. Ontwijk draaiingen, onderbreek Storm Bolt, dispel vloeken.
mainAbilities.da: Amani-shaman. Storm og vind-evner. Undgå hvirvler, afbryd Storm Bolt, dispel forbandelser.
